title: Festivals Celebrated by the Indian Community
description: Major Indian festivals celebrated across Belgium.

items.name: Diwali
items.description: Festival of lights, celebrated with community events in Brussels and Antwerp.

items.name: Holi
items.description: Festival of colours, often celebrated with outdoor community gatherings when weather permits.

items.name: Indian Independence Day
items.description: Flag hoisting and cultural events, often hosted at or near the Embassy of India.

items.name: Navratri / Garba
items.description: Nine nights of dance and celebration, popular within the Gujarati community in Antwerp.
